resources.string: Allows TapTranslate to inject text and automatically paste it in apps like Reddit or WhatsApp where text-selection permissions are restricted.
Choose how the translator behaves in text menus right now:
Tap here to go to Accessibility settings and allow us to auto-paste text over Reddit seamlessly.
TapTranslate doesn\'t have a main app you need to open daily. It operates uniquely as a hidden context button for max speed.
Highlight any text you type, click the 3-dots option menu, and select TapTranslate to convert it instantly.
A one-time 30MB dictionary download is required. After that, all translations happen internally, fully offline.
